summary: Phase 47 Follow-up: Guided Fill-In Bug Fixes - All core features tested and working correctly. Required-field detection, Start/Next/Finish state transitions, auto-advance, and manual click sync all functioning as expected.

required_field_detection.details: Hook correctly identifies 5 required fields (3 signatures + 2 initials) from template with 9 total fields. Signature/initials are required by default; date is auto-filled; checkbox/radio need explicit required=true.

assigned_field_ids_fallback.details: When assigned_field_ids is empty array [], hook falls back to matching by recipientIds. Unassigned fields (assigned_to=null) are treated as 'public' and included for all signers.

field_ordering.details: Fields sorted by page → y → x. sortByReadingOrder function uses 5px tolerance for y-coordinate comparison to handle slight vertical misalignment.

start_button_state.details: Start button visible when started===false AND pending>0. After clicking Start, button changes to 'Next' and Fill In arrow appears.

next_button_navigation.details: Next button advances to the NEXT pending field AFTER current activeFieldId in sorted order. Tested 3 consecutive Next clicks - arrow moved correctly between fields.

auto_advance.details: After filling signature field via Type tab, pending count decreased from 5 to 4 and activeFieldId moved to next pending field automatically.

finish_button_state.details: Finish button disabled (bg-gray-200 text-gray-400 cursor-not-allowed) when required fields incomplete OR signerConfirmed===false. Requires both guidedAllComplete AND signerConfirmed AND canSign().

progress_bar.details: Progress bar renders at bottom of guided header. Width = completedCount/totalRequired * 100%. Initially at 0%, updated to 20% after filling 1 of 5 fields.

badge_color.details: Badge shows indigo color (bg-indigo-100 text-indigo-700) when fields pending. Will turn emerald when allComplete OR hasAnyRequired=false.

manual_click_sync.details: Clicking on initials field opened initials modal and synced activeFieldId. syncFromClick function correctly maps radio clicks to group's first required field.

header_copy.details: Shows 'X of Y required completed — Z left' format. Tested: '0 of 5 required completed — 5 left' initially, '1 of 5 required completed — 4 left' after filling one field.

fill_in_arrow.details: Floating green 'Fill In' arrow with data-testid='guided-fill-in-arrow' appears to LEFT of active field. Uses emerald-500 background with triangle pointer.

consent_screen_regression.details: ConsentScreen still shows before document view with 'Review and continue' heading, checkbox, and Continue button.

signature_reuse_regression.details: SignatureReusePrompt still works - signature modal opens with Draw/Type/Upload tabs and 'Apply to all' checkbox.

date_auto_fill_regression.details: Date field shows auto-filled value '04/18/2026' in MM/DD/YYYY format with green checkmark.

details: Accepts recipientIds: string[] (array) and assignedFieldIds: string[]|null
When assignedFieldIds is non-empty array, uses it as source of truth (line 109)
When assignedFieldIds is null/empty, falls back to recipientIds matching (lines 113-116)
Radio groups de-duplicated via GROUP_KEY_FOR - each unique groupName counts as ONE field (lines 129-141)
Sorting by page → y → x with 5px y-tolerance (lines 79-85)
Auto-advance finds NEXT pending after current idx, not just pendingFieldIds[0] (lines 176-182)
goToNext also finds next AFTER current position (lines 198-204)
syncFromClick maps radio clicks to group's first field (lines 214-219)
Header shows Start→Next transition via 'started' flag (lines 795-796)
Progress bar with dynamic width and emerald color at 100% (lines 869-876)
Badge color changes based on allComplete/hasAnyRequired (lines 808-812)
Renders Fill In arrow with data-testid='guided-fill-in-arrow' (lines 656-669, 806-820)
Auto-switches page when activeFieldId is on different page (lines 300-302)
Scrolls field into view with block:'center' (lines 305-309)
Calls onFieldClick for manual click sync (lines 650, 802)

critical_code_review_comments: All Phase 47 follow-up bug fixes are correctly implemented
Required-field detection now properly handles assigned_field_ids from backend
Next button navigation correctly finds NEXT pending field after current position
Auto-advance logic correctly moves to next pending field in sorted order
Multi-page navigation code is correct but could not be tested (test template has only 1 page)
seed_data_creation: Used existing test document: R5azq2m5g5fvWzHKqQrN8-ZsJ7MnsuFedEHlqI2HRW8 (Test Signer NoAuth) with template 5f8425c8-e067-4108-818e-cf76aaa30f6d
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 47 follow-up fixes verified. Test document R5azq2m5g5fvWzHKqQrN8-ZsJ7MnsuFedEHlqI2HRW8 has 5 required fields (3 signatures, 2 initials) on single page. Multi-page navigation could not be tested due to single-page template. To test multi-page: create template with fields on pages 1, 2, 3 and verify page auto-switch when clicking Next.
features_tested: Required-field detection with assigned_field_ids (empty array fallback)
Date auto-filled and excluded from pending
Field ordering by page → y → x
Next button advances to NEXT pending after current position
Finish button disabled until allComplete + signerConfirmed + canSign()
Badge color (indigo when pending, emerald when complete)
Fill In arrow positioning and styling
untested_features: Multi-page navigation (test template has only 1 page)
Radio group de-duplication (test template has legacy radio without groupName)
Hidden-by-conditional field exclusion (no conditional logic in test template)
field_disabled field exclusion (no disabled fields in test template)
Edge case: template with only 1 required field
Edge case: template with no required fields (hasAnyRequired=false)
